channel.title: Courses on Nature Works
channel.description: Recent content in Courses on Nature Works

item.title: Resources
item.description:
Wildlife & forest garden references

Name Details Online Download Forest Garden Spreadsheet All the plants in Martin Crawford’s Creating a Forest Garden. http://localhost:1313/resources/

item.title: Freebies
item.description:
I have a lot of wildlife & forest garden freebies

My free stuff Forest Garden Spreadsheet - all plants in Creating a Forest Garden Garden Wild Spreadsheet - UK native wild flowers Apple varieties spreadsheet - by Chris Day Plan a Backyard Forest mini-course - basic setup of a forest garden plan Forest garden YouTube channel - design tips, walkthroughs, plants, ideas etc Substack newsletter - weekly updates, links, thoughts, ramblings References Plants For A Future - database of useful plants Plant Atlas - botanical native plant reference for Britain & Ireland RHS plant finder - ornamental plant reference RHS plant finder with native filter DBIF - UK Database of Insects & their Food Plants Database of Pollinator Interactions - pollinator interactions UK native flowers NBN Atlas - National Biodiversity Network of life in the UK GBIF - Global Biodiversity Information Facility, life on Earth Wikimedia Commons - open license images Archive. http://localhost:1313/freebies/
